scope_statement: Financial Services Agency of Japan supervisory guidelines, cyber security guidelines, AML/CFT guidelines, and inspection manuals for banks, insurance, and securities firms operating in Japan.
scope_exclusions: Confidential FSA examination feedback or supervisory letters
FSA enforcement actions, administrative sanctions, or business improvement orders
Bank of Japan payment regulations (different regulator)
METI cybersecurity requirements for critical infrastructure (different regulator)
Draft regulations and public consultation papers
Regional FSA bureau guidance not centrally published
Section-level inspection items (current ingest stores each framework as a single row)
JA<->EN translation pairing (each URL is treated independently)
bilingual_pair_matching_note: Bilingual breakdown counts each language entry independently. Japanese and English versions of the same FSA document are treated as separate rows; cross-language pairing is a planned 0.2.0 enhancement.

sources.name: FSA Japan Supervisory Guidelines & Inspection Manuals (English portal)
sources.authority: Financial Services Agency of Japan (金融庁)
sources.completeness_note: Subset of Japanese-only content. English translations published by FSA can lag Japanese releases by 1-6 months.

sources.name: FSA Japan Laws & Guidelines catalog (Japanese primary portal)
sources.authority: Financial Services Agency of Japan (金融庁)
sources.completeness_note: Top-level catalogue from FSA Japanese portal. Section-level inspection items (Ⅱ-1-1 etc) are stored at framework granularity in the current ingest.

gaps.description: Inspection items are stored at framework granularity, not section granularity.
gaps.reason: Section-numbered parsing (Ⅱ-1-1, 別紙) is a future enhancement.

gaps.description: Japanese primary documents are not linked to their official English translations.
gaps.reason: Ingest treats each URL independently; cross-language matching requires title canonicalisation.

gaps.description: Administrative sanctions and business-improvement orders not indexed.
gaps.reason: Published individually under /status/; separate ingest needed.

tools.name: jp_fsa_search_guidance
tools.description: Combined FTS5 search across inspections and guidelines (JA + EN).

tools.name: jp_fsa_get_guideline
tools.description: Retrieve a specific inspection item or guidance document by reference.

tools.name: jp_fsa_search_inspections
tools.description: Search inspection-manual items with category and domain filters.

tools.name: jp_fsa_list_categories
tools.description: List all FSA guidance categories indexed by this server.

tools.name: jp_fsa_about
tools.description: Server metadata, version, and coverage summary.

tools.name: jp_fsa_list_sources
tools.description: Data provenance: source URLs, retrieval method, and licence.

tools.name: jp_fsa_check_data_freshness
tools.description: Per-source data age with Current / Due / OVERDUE status.
